sentences.arabic: يَوْمُ الْجُمُعَةِ هُوَ يَوْمٌ مُمَيَّزٌ لِلْعَائِلَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Petak je poseban dan za arapsku porodicu.
sentences.translationEn: Friday is a special day for the Arab family.

sentences.arabic: يَذْهَبُ الرِّجَالُ وَالْأَطْفَالُ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ لِأَدَاءِ الصَّلَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Muškarci i djeca idu u džamiju na molitvu.
sentences.translationEn: Men and children go to the mosque to perform prayers.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، تَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَةُ الْكَبِيرَةُ فِي بَيْتِ الْجَدِّ.
sentences.translation: Nakon toga, proširena porodica se okuplja u djedovoj kući.
sentences.translationEn: After that, the extended family gathers at the grandfather's house.

sentences.arabic: يَتَنَاوَلُ الْجَمِيعُ طَعَامَ الْغَدَاءِ وَيَتَحَدَّثُونَ عَنْ أَخْبَارِ الْأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Svi ručaju i razgovaraju o novostima iz protekle sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone has lunch and talks about the week's news.

sentences.arabic: تُقَوِّي هَذِهِ الِاجْتِمَاعَاتُ الرَّوَابِطَ الْأُسَرِيَّةَ بَيْنَ الْأَجْيَالِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi sastanci jačaju porodične veze između generacija.
sentences.translationEn: These gatherings strengthen family bonds between generations.
